de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Class ProofUserManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.ProofUserManager

  • public final class ProofUserManager
extends Object
    This singleton class is used to manage user of a Proof to make sure that a Proof is only disposed via Proof.dispose() if it is no longer in use (no user available).
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private WeakHashMap<KeYEnvironment<?>,Set<Proof>> environmentProofs
      Stores for each KeYEnvironment the known Proofs.
      private static ProofUserManager instance
      The only instance of this class.
      private WeakHashMap<Proof,KeYEnvironment<?>> proofEnvironments
      Stores for each Proof the KeYEnvironment it lives in..
      private WeakHashMap<Proof,Set<Object>> proofUsers
      Stores for each Proof the registered users.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      private ProofUserManager()
      Forbid multiple instances.

        Stores for each Proof the registered users.

        private WeakHashMap<KeYEnvironment<?>,Set<Proof>> environmentProofs
        Stores for each KeYEnvironment the known Proofs.

        private WeakHashMap<Proof,KeYEnvironment<?>> proofEnvironments
        Stores for each Proof the KeYEnvironment it lives in..

        The only instance of this class.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ProofUserManager

        private ProofUserManager()
        Forbid multiple instances.

    • Method Detail

      • addUser

        public void addUser(Proof proof,
           KeYEnvironment<?> environment,
           Object user)
        Registers the Proof with the given user if it is not already registered. If it is already registered the user is added to the proof users if not already present.
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof.
        environment - Optional the KeYEnvironment which will be disposed if the last known Proof is removed from it.
        user - The user.

      • removeUserAndDispose

        public void removeUserAndDispose(Proof proof,
                        Object user)
        Removes the user from the registered proof users. If the proof has no user anymore it is automatically disposed via Proof.dispose().
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof.
        userThe - user.

      • getProofs

        public Proof[] getProofs()
        Returns all registered Proofs.
        Returns:
        All registered Proofs.

      • getUsers

        public Object[] getUsers(Proof proof)
        Returns all registered user of the given Proof.
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof to get its users.
        Returns:
        The registered user of the Proof.

      • getEnvironment

        public KeYEnvironment<?> getEnvironment(Proof proof)
        Returns the known environment of the given Proof.
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof to get its KeYEnvironment.
        Returns:
        The KeYEnvironment of the given Proof.

      • getProofs

        public Proof[] getProofs(KeYEnvironment<?> environment)
        Returns all known Proofs of the given KeYEnvironment.
        Parameters:
        environment - The known Proofs of the given KeYEnvironment.
        Returns:
        All known Proofs of the given KeYEnvironment.

      • getInstance

        public static ProofUserManager getInstance()
        Returns the singleton instance of this class.
        Returns:
        The singleton instance of this class.
